_comment: Verified against bankffin.html (rendered from https://bankffin.kz/ru/exchange-rates at 2026-05-03). The first numeric rate after each currency code is the 'Покупка' (bank-buys) rate; the second is 'Продажа' (bank-sells). We define expected as the FIRST value (Покупка) for consistency with the document-order convention used in bcc_expected.json.
